name: restarred
description: A full-stack TypeScript starter designed to be built on by AI coding agents

scripts.build: bun run build:client && bun run build:css
scripts.dev: bun run dev:client & bun run dev:server & bun run dev:css
scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test bun run src/server/database/cli.ts up && bun run test:app && bun run test:api && bun run test:auth-callback && bun run test:auth-logout && bun run test:admin && bun run test:home && bun run test:services && bun run test:github-api && bun run test:email-verification && bun run test:jobs && bun run test:dispatcher && bun run test:client
scripts.test:services: NODE_ENV=test bun test src/server/services/events.test.ts src/server/services/analytics.test.ts src/server/services/auth.test.ts src/server/services/csrf.test.ts src/server/services/digest-email.test.ts src/server/services/digest.test.ts src/server/services/email.test.ts src/server/services/encryption.test.ts src/server/services/logger.test.ts src/server/services/sessions.test.ts src/server/services/stars.test.ts src/server/services/users.test.ts src/server/middleware src/server/utils src/server/test-utils
scripts.test:file: NODE_ENV=test bun run src/server/database/cli.ts up && NODE_ENV=test bun test
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck
